articles.title_en: ‘All we could do was watch our merchandise burn’: Russian small business owners respond to losing their stock when Ukrainian drones hit two Wildberries warehouses
articles.lead_en: On the night of July 18, Ukrainian drones struck two Wildberries warehouses — one outside Moscow and one in the Tambov region. At least eight people were killed and more than 80 injured.
articles.title_raw: ‘All we could do was watch our merchandise burn’: Russian small business owners respond to losing their stock when Ukrainian drones hit two Wildberries warehouses
articles.lead_raw: On the night of July 18, Ukrainian drones struck two Wildberries warehouses — one outside Moscow and one in the Tambov region. At least eight people were killed and more than 80 injured.

articles.title_en: They pried the gates open with their hands. They jumped from a freight door. Workers describe the chaos inside two burning warehouses run by Wildberries, Russia’s largest online retailer.
articles.lead_en: Wildberries warehouses in Moscow and Tambov oblasts caught fire after Ukrainian drone strikes, and the evacuation of employees was marred by violations, according to eyewitness accounts cited by Post- magazine and the independent investigative outlet iStories. In some sections, managers kept workers inside the burning buildings; employees had to open automatic gates by hand, evacuate chaotically through narrow doorways, and flee the warehouse grounds through a forest.
articles.title_raw: They pried the gates open with their hands. They jumped from a freight door. Workers describe the chaos inside two burning warehouses run by Wildberries, Russia’s largest online retailer.
articles.lead_raw: Wildberries warehouses in Moscow and Tambov oblasts caught fire after Ukrainian drone strikes, and the evacuation of employees was marred by violations, according to eyewitness accounts cited by Post- magazine and the independent investigative outlet iStories. In some sections, managers kept workers inside the burning buildings; employees had to open automatic gates by hand, evacuate chaotically through narrow doorways, and flee the warehouse grounds through a forest.

articles.title_en: Photos and videos show the aftermath of Ukrainian drone strikes that killed eight night-shift workers at online retailer Wildberries’ warehouses in Russia
articles.lead_en: In the early hours of July 18, Ukrainian drones struck two Wildberries logistics centers in the Moscow and Tambov regions. At a warehouse in the city of Kotovsk, seven night-shift workers were killed and 25 were injured.
articles.title_raw: Photos and videos show the aftermath of Ukrainian drone strikes that killed eight night-shift workers at online retailer Wildberries’ warehouses in Russia
articles.lead_raw: In the early hours of July 18, Ukrainian drones struck two Wildberries logistics centers in the Moscow and Tambov regions. At a warehouse in the city of Kotovsk, seven night-shift workers were killed and 25 were injured.

articles.title_en: 50B rubles in damage, up to 15% of its warehouse space, and a contract clause that shifts the loss onto small vendors: inside Ukraine’s strike on Russia’s online retail giant, Wildberries
articles.lead_en: Eight people have been killed and more than 50 injured in Ukraine’s strike on Wildberries warehouses in the Moscow region and the Tambov region. Volodymyr Zelensky said the strikes hit warehouses holding components used to make drones.
